历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Science (Physics Category) minimum rankings approximately 1075→1027→741→994, overall fluctuating within 741–1075 range in recent three years. In 2024, due to expansion of Engineering Experimental Class, ranking moved forward to 741; in 2025, it adjusted back to 994. The 2025 baseline is approximately 994th place. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan Science (Physics Category) was 18 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 41 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 123, an increase of 82 (200% increase) compared to 2025, greatly increasing supply and significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, C9 League member; Soft Science Main Ranking 2021–2026 consistently ranked 4th, belonging to the top national university level. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (313 retracted papers), teacher ethics incidents, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking 42nd (relatively hot), exposure moderately high. Historical admission anomalies: in 2021, Henan Science admission line was the lowest among C9, a low-attention event. Has 28 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Clinical Medicine A+, Biology A+, Business Administration A+, etc., extremely strong disciplinary strength, highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with SJTU's flagship majors. Sichuan Province 2026 Physics Category candidates estimated at approximately 329,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025, overall competition intensifies. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 994, the 2026 enrollment plan significantly expanding by 200% (supply surge), Sichuan Physics Category candidates increasing by about 15.5% (demand increase), the strong appeal of the top-tier school and advantageous disciplines, and the slight cooling effect of negative reputation, but taking into account the top-tier school's ability to absorb expansion, after moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2037, with a range of 1805–2269.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, SJTU significantly expands enrollment in Sichuan Physics Category to 123, with predicted ranking range 1805–2269, notably later than the 2025 baseline of 994. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as main targets, Tier 1 for reach, and Tier 3 for safety. Candidates significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 1800) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer, AI, IEEE Pilot Class). Candidates near the upper bound (outside 2200) are advised to use Tier 3 Natural Science Experimental Class as safety, while also considering opportunities in Tier 2 Finance, Science Experimental Class, etc.
